title: Severance project state
description: ~/.claude/severance/projects/<slug>/<session_id>.json — per-session project state written by gate.sh, heartbeat.sh, resume.sh and the menu bar app. Partitioned by session_id (issue #15): concurrent same-repo sessions each own a file, so status/resume_at/tmux_pane/blocked_count no longer clobber one another. session_id keys the file and is therefore required and non-null. This directory IS the API between plugin and app (PRD §6.2).

status.description: active -> severed -> active/orphaned; paused is orthogonal.

reason.description: Why the project is in its current non-active state; null when active.

preempted_by.description: Slug of the higher-priority project that preempted this one (§5.5).

session_id.description: Claude Code session id from hook stdin; keys the state-file path projects/<slug>/<session_id>.json.

resume_count.description: Auto-resume attempts so far (cap SEVERANCE_MAX_RESUMES, default 3).

blocked_count.description: R3: consecutive blocked tool calls this session; escalate + stop scheduling resumes at 5.

preempt_sweep_ts.description: R5: epoch seconds of this preemptor's last preemption sweep (throttle: at most once / 60s).

ts.description: Epoch seconds of the last heartbeat/update (freshness for the dashboard).

paused.description: Pause flag, orthogonal to status: set by the app/user (manual) or by a preemption sweep (§5.5). The gate trips while paused.
